Code fragment: public final TableField<UsersRecord, String> ID = createField("id", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.VARCHAR(36).nullable(false), this, "");
Explanation: The primary key column is generically named 'id' instead of a more descriptive name like 'user_id'. Consider renaming the primary key to 'user_id' to make it self-documenting and avoid ambiguity when joining tables.

Using selectFrom(Tables.USERS) fetches all columns from the USERS table into a UsersRecord, even though only specific fields (id, password, username, role) are needed. Consider using select() with explicit column references like dsl.select(Tables.USERS.ID, Tables.USERS.PASSWORD, Tables.USERS.USERNAME, Tables.USERS.ROLE).from(Tables.USERS).
